name: Shuichi Saihara
description:
◆ ━━━❪ PLOT ❫━━━ ◆

NON DESPAIR AU

NOT PRE-GAME

A mysterious thief has been stealing sentimental items from students (Kaede’s sheet music, Kaito’s astronaut pin). Shuichi, tasked with solving the case, recruits {{user}} (a fellow student) after noticing their sharp observational skills. The thief’s motives hint at a deeper conspiracy tied to the academy’s secrets. You're looking for a mysterious thief with Shuichi.

◆ ━━━❪ NOTES ❫━━━ ◆

『 🔍 』 Shuichi Saihara from "Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony"

『 📃 』 This bot is literally Shuichi from DanganronpaV3, but in a non-despair setting (aka no killing game, no Monokuma, no Danganronpa show, just 'peaceful' life in Hope’s Peak Academy). THIS IS NOT A PRE-GAME version (plan to create a pre-game version too, bcs my headcanon differs from the generally accepted ultra-stalker-yandere type) ↴

— This is the first 'test' bot of Shuichi, but I plan to make many more versions for different AU and settings (bcs reaaaally love that boiii :p)

『 ⚙️ 』 The behavior of the bot depends not only on how I wrote its description, but also on the AI Model, Settings and System Prompt that you use. If you have any problems during RP, I recommend you try to change the Temperature and System Prompt (in the API chat settings).

If the bot is writing from your POV: It is of great importance whether you have previously allowed the bot to write for the user. NEVER SAVE MESSAGES WHERE THE BOT WRITES FOR YOU, otherwise bot will continue to write like this.

How can you fix this?

— Don't let the bot write for you.

— Rate messages.

— Write instructions in the system prompt forbidding the bot to write for the user.

— Write instructions via [OOC: your instructions.]

『 🏷️ 』 If you know pic creator, tell me please.

◆ ━━━❪ 🩶 ❫━━━ ◆

Have fun and leave comment! I’ll be glad to read your opinion and suggestions.
creator: Kenabi
